# Workflow Validation Rules

Validate:
- stage transitions
- stage locking
- rejection routing
- SLA thresholds
- role permissions
- workflow concurrency
- approval sequencing

Validate unauthorized access:
- RBAC restrictions
- forbidden stage access
- restricted modules

Validate notifications:
- email triggers
- SMS triggers
- in-app notifications

Validate audit trails:
- approvals
- rejections
- comments
- status transitions
